case_title: KIM, SHERYL G. VS FITZGERALD, WILLIAM PATRICK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KIM, SHERYL G. AS TO DEFENDANT FITZGERALD, WILLIAM PATRICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $30.00) SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FITZGERALD, WILLIAM PATRICK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2007 - JUDGMENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIM, SHERYL G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FITZGERALD, WILLIAM PATRICK $3,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,855.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $7500.00 AND ATTRIBUTES 50% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO THE PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FITZGERALD, WILLIAM PATRICK
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
